name: public_safety_procurement_shortcut_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A SWAT callout hinges on a single confidential informant tip that contradicts open-source video already circulating. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety procurement shortcut lumen rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Ravi Kaur
agents.identity: I am Ravi Kaur, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Hughes
agents.identity: I am Arjun Hughes, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so utility does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so rights does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Ravi Kaur must choose under rights versus utility. What does Ravi Kaur do?
